---
title: "Is there a trade-off between processing and maintenance of information in working memory?"
author: "Chenyu Li & Klaus Oberauer"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: white
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    auto-stretch: false
    embed-resources: true
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: false
    incremental: true
    transition: fade
    smaller: false
    css: slides.css
    preview-links: auto
editor: source
---

## Introduction

hello, how are you?

## Introduction

## The present study

## Experiment 1 -- Design

::: {style="margin-top: 3em;"}
![](../figures/figures_illustration/exp1_condition.jpg){width="80%"}
:::

## Experiment 1 -- Procedure

![](../figures/figures_illustration/exp1_procedure.jpg){width="88%"}
